nasb.text: For everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and he who humbles himself will be exalted.”

esv.text: For everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and he who humbles himself will be exalted.”

cnv.text: 因為凡高抬自己的，必要降卑；自己謙卑的，必要升高。”

ccb.text: 因为自高的人必遭贬抑，谦卑的人必得尊荣。”

csbs.text: 因为每一个自我高举的都会被降卑；而自我降卑的都会被高举。”
